reference.title: Runs API reference
reference.shortdesc: Endpoints for listing, retrieving, canceling, and replaying runs.

section.title: Runs endpoints
section.p: Runs represent execution attempts of a job.

strow.stentry: Filter by status (queued, running, succeeded, failed, canceled).

section.title: Get a run
section.p: Returns a run, including status, metrics, and error details (if any).

section.title: Cancel a run
section.p: Attempts to cancel a run in queued or running state.

section.title: Replay a run
section.p: Creates a new run using the original run configuration.

section.title: Get run logs
section.p: Returns structured log lines. Use pagination for large logs.
